summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of StayWake Expo app completed successfully. All critical flows verified end-to-end: Home/Alarms screen, Add/Edit/Delete alarm, Toggle, and the full CORE WAKE-COMPLETION LOOP (TEST RUN -> Ring -> Math Proof Mission -> Stay-Awake banner -> auto Check-In -> Check-in math mission -> 2nd Check-In -> SUCCESS -> Done -> banner cleared). Stats tab correctly shows streak=1 with SUCCESS history entry after the run. All required testIDs are present and functional. Only non-fatal item: a console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (RN deprecation, harmless). Backend testing skipped per request (no custom backend).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' originating from a child component (likely react-native-reanimated/keyboard-controller internal). Non-blocking but should be tracked. Reference: runtime console during /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx load.

action_items: (Optional) Track the deprecated 'pointerEvents' prop warning — likely from a third-party lib version; may auto-resolve on next Expo SDK bump.

(Optional/secondary) Manually verify the missed-check-in re-ring path (let checkin-countdown reach 0). Not auto-tested; logic in /app/frontend/app/checkin.tsx -> onCheckInMissed -> phase='ringing' looks correct.
critical_code_review_comments: AlarmContext.tsx is ~500 lines and approaches the size-split threshold (700). Consider extracting session-lifecycle (startSession, onDismissPassed, onCheckInPassed/Missed, finalizeSuccess) into a dedicated hook/module for maintainability — not blocking.

Scheduler tick gates firing to now.getSeconds() < 4. This is acceptable but means a backgrounded/throttled tab could miss the firing window; OK for an on-device alarm app intended for real device use.
All interactive elements use testID consistently; React Native components (View/Text/Pressable/Switch) used correctly; styles via StyleSheet.create. No HTML primitives detected.
seed_data_creation: Created a second alarm ('Test Run Alarm') via the Add Alarm modal and one SUCCESS MorningRecord (streak=1) via the wake-completion loop. Data persists to AsyncStorage under staywake.alarms.v1 / staywake.history.v1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use TEST RUN (FAST) button (data-testid alarm-test-sample-wakeup) to compress timers (~15s check-in window, ~20s countdown). For math missions read parent.innerText of [data-testid=math-input-display] — equation is on the first non-'?' line in format 'A op B' where op is +, -, or ×. Type via [data-testid=numpad-N] then numpad-enter. Seeded alarm has 2 check-ins so the loop is: Stop -> Mission -> Banner (0/2) -> CheckIn -> Mission -> Banner (1/2) -> CheckIn -> Mission -> Success. The success screen has testID 'success-done-btn'. Stats tab streak via [data-testid=streak-number].
